name: SCP Anomaly
overview: Amelia Wood is an investigative journalist hellbent on finding answers for the disappearance of her parents when she was 16 years old. After meeting Finch online and discovering the quiet mountainside town of "Driftwood" New mysterious events, anomalies entities and creatures become known to her, causing her to pull at each and every thread and putting herself and the rest of the world in unbelievable danger.
